requirement.description: Upon reception of body status information, the gateway shall immediately evaluate the status of the turn indicators.

test_cases.title: Verify turn indicator evaluation when both indicators are inactive
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; LeftIndicator = 0; RightIndicator = 0; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_001_all_inactive(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify turn indicator evaluation when left indicator is active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_002_left_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify turn indicator evaluation when right indicator is active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_003_right_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify turn indicator evaluation when both indicators are active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_004_both_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify immediate evaluation on indicator activation
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both indicators initially inactive
test_cases.expected_result: TurnActive transitions from 0 to 1 immediately after BCM update
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_005_immediate_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_turn_active(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify immediate clearing when indicators are deactivated
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; At least one indicator active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_006_immediate_clear(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_turn_active(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify TurnActive remains asserted if one indicator stays active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both indicators initially active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_007_partial_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)
